query: Replace the SVD img2vid conditioning with AnimateDiff motion module to enable longer, more controllable video generation while preserving the existing upscaling and color matching stages.

desired.outcome: The workflow generates videos using AnimateDiff instead of SVD, with full control over motion settings, while retaining upscaling, color matching, and frame output.
desired.quality: The new conditioning path is fully wired, AnimateDiff nodes are correctly initialized, all downstream nodes (color match, upscale, encode) remain functional, and no orphaned connections.

_tags.author_rationale: This query forces a major model swap that tests understanding of both SVD and AnimateDiff conditioning, while requiring preservation of the entire post-processing pipeline.
